description: Run tests; branch on the evidence. Passing tests may proceed to a checkpoint-gated ship; failing tests route to a bounded debug-and-retry loop. Any transition outside {ship, debug} from run-tests is rejected as an unsupported branch.

run-tests.description: Execute the test suite; the result decides the branch.

debug.description: Investigate and fix the failure, then re-run tests. Bounded by run-tests' max_retries.

ship.description: Write/merge transition. High risk: requires a verified Phase 0 checkpoint before entry.
